title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH LEBANON TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens high-risk individuals and provides medical management for those who test positive. 1600 S Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (541) 451-5932 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 451-5932 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Linn County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in downtown Lebanon at the intersection of the Santiam Highway and Cox Rd. Across from Oil Can Henry's. Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH LEBANON
